description_long: This object is a compact, modern shotgun with a predominantly matte black finish and a streamlined, rectangular body. The grip is ergonomically shaped and features a wood-textured brown coloration, contrasting with the rest of the weapon. The barrel is relatively short and emits a thin, straight line, possibly representing a laser sight or tracer. The top of the shotgun has a small raised section, likely for mounting sights or optics. The trigger area is protected by a rounded, medium-sized trigger guard, and the overall design is minimalistic with no visible external magazine or pump mechanism. The shotgun's form factor suggests it is designed for close-quarters use, with a focus on maneuverability and ease of handling.
description: A compact, matte black shotgun with a brown ergonomic grip and a short barrel, featuring a minimalistic, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the brown grip, and the thin line extending from the barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the body, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the grip and the barrel's extension.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the body, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
